title: The BetaCore Network
description: A vanilla+ mod pack used on the BetaCore Network focused on automation exploration and magic
body:
The BetaCore Network is a forge 1.20.1 vanilla plus themed modpack that add a lot of new terrain generation, automation, magic, and new sturctures to explore. This modpack has been designed to connect to a custom server network called 'The BetaCore Network'

  The modpack is optomized for multiplayer and runs well on most mid range computers. This modpacks biggest features include: quality of life improvments, shaders support, server compatibility, 3D resource packs, custom music, the create mod, the botania mod, vertical slabs and stair, connected textures, custom paintings, and TRAINS!!! (with the create mod).
